data.title: check-usage.sh reports obviously incorrect 5hr usage percentage (4900%)
data.description: check-usage.sh reported USAGE_5HR: 4900% and VERDICT: 2 (paused) when the actual usage is not anywhere near that level. The incorrect reading caused the sprint orchestrator to halt all sub-agent dispatch (MAX_AGENTS=0). Suspected cause: check-usage.sh may be misreading the API response, computing a ratio against a wrong baseline, or the cached result is stale/corrupted. The 4900% figure is implausible for any real usage window. Repro: run plugins/dso/scripts/check-usage.sh and compare output to actual Claude usage dashboard.
